name: Ground Beef Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, stirring until they are golden brown.
3. Add the ground beef to the pan and stir with a fork until it is fully browned.
4. Sprinkle the flour, salt, powdered ginger, and curry powder evenly over the meat mixture.
5. Gradually pour in the milk while continuously stirring until the sauce thickens.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve over hot buttered noodles or steamed rice.
